name: how-to-fail-at-almost-everything-and-still-win-big-kind-of-the-story-of-my-life
description: Scott Adams' 'How to Fail at Almost Everything and Still Win Big: Kind of the Story of My Life' — the creator of Dilbert shares his personal success system. Goals vs systems, energy management, affirmations, pattern recognition, simplification, skill stacking, and the math of success. A practical, funny guide to building a winning life through failure.
